name: Prior Art Provenance Router
description: FastAPI router implementing community-driven prior art nomination and voting for AI tools. Manages nominations claiming tools as prior art for platform features, with vote-based confirmation thresholds and author notifications.

types.name: NominationRequest

fields.name: tool_slug
fields.description: Unique slug identifier for the tool

fields.name: platform
fields.description: Platform name that implemented the feature

fields.name: platform_feature
fields.description: Specific feature that the tool predates

fields.name: evidence
fields.description: Evidence supporting the prior art claim

types.description: Request body for nominating a tool as prior art

types.name: PriorArtListResponse

fields.name: prior_art
fields.description: Array of confirmed prior art nominations

types.description: Response containing list of confirmed prior art nominations

fields.name: id
fields.description: UUID of the nomination as string

types.name: PendingListResponse
types.description: Response containing list of pending nominations

types.name: VoteResponse
types.description: Response after voting on a nomination

functions.name: list_prior_art
functions.description: Retrieves all confirmed prior art nominations with tool, nominator, and vote information, ordered by confirmation date descending

inputs.name: db
inputs.description: Database session injected by FastAPI dependency

preconditions: Database session is active and connected
postconditions: Returns dictionary with 'prior_art' key containing list of confirmed nominations
Each nomination includes tool (slug, name), platform, platform_feature, evidence, nominator username, confirmed_at ISO timestamp, and vote count
side_effects: Executes SELECT query on PriorArtNomination table with WHERE confirmed == True
Eager loads related tool and nominator entities via selectinload

structured_side_effects.description: Reads from PriorArtNomination, Tool, User tables

functions.name: list_pending
functions.description: Retrieves all unconfirmed prior art nominations with tool, nominator, votes, and threshold information, ordered by creation date descending

inputs.name: db
inputs.description: Database session injected by FastAPI dependency

preconditions: Database session is active and connected
postconditions: Returns dictionary with 'pending' key containing list of unconfirmed nominations
Each nomination includes tool, platform, platform_feature, evidence, nominator username, vote count, threshold from settings, and created_at ISO timestamp
side_effects: Executes SELECT query on PriorArtNomination table with WHERE confirmed == False
Eager loads related tool, nominator, and votes entities via selectinload

structured_side_effects.description: Reads from PriorArtNomination, Tool, User, PriorArtVote tables

functions.name: nominate
functions.description: Creates a new prior art nomination for a tool and optionally notifies the tool author if they are not the nominator

inputs.name: body
inputs.description: Nomination details including tool_slug, platform, platform_feature, evidence

inputs.name: user
inputs.description: Authenticated user injected by get_current_user dependency

inputs.name: db
inputs.description: Database session injected by get_db dependency

error_cases.name: tool_not_found
error_cases.condition: Tool with given slug not found or is_active == False

preconditions: Database session is active and connected
Tool with given slug exists and is_active == True
postconditions: PriorArtNomination record created in database with confirmed=False (default)
If tool.author_id != user.id, Notification created for tool author with type='prior_art_nomination'
Returns dictionary with nomination UUID as string and status='nominated'
side_effects: Conditionally inserts Notification record if author is not nominator

structured_side_effects.description: Reads from Tool table to find tool by slug
Writes to PriorArtNomination and optionally Notification tables

functions.name: vote_on_nomination
functions.description: Casts a vote for a prior art nomination, checks vote threshold, confirms nomination if threshold reached, and notifies tool author on confirmation

inputs.name: nomination_id
inputs.description: UUID of the nomination as string

inputs.name: user
inputs.description: Authenticated user injected by get_current_user dependency

inputs.name: db
inputs.description: Database session injected by get_db dependency

error_cases.name: invalid_uuid
error_cases.condition: nomination_id cannot be parsed as valid UUID

error_cases.name: nomination_not_found
error_cases.condition: No nomination exists with given UUID

preconditions: Database session is active and connected
nomination_id is a valid UUID string
postconditions: If nomination already confirmed: returns {'status': 'already_confirmed'} without side effects
If user already voted: returns {'status': 'already_voted'} without side effects
Otherwise: PriorArtVote record created, returns {'status': 'voted', 'vote_count': int, 'confirmed': bool}
If vote_count >= threshold after vote: nomination.confirmed set to True, nomination.confirmed_at set to current UTC time, Notification created for tool author
side_effects: Reads nomination and related votes/tool from database
Checks for existing vote by user
Flushes to get vote reflected in count query
Conditionally updates nomination confirmed/confirmed_at fields and inserts Notification (if threshold reached)

structured_side_effects.description: Writes to PriorArtVote, conditionally updates PriorArtNomination and writes to Notification

invariants: Users cannot vote multiple times on the same nomination
Confirmed nominations cannot receive additional votes (early return with 'already_confirmed' status)
Tool authors receive notifications when their tool is nominated (unless they are the nominator)
Tool authors receive notifications when nomination is confirmed
Nomination IDs are UUIDs stored/returned as strings
All datetime values returned as ISO format strings
confirmed_at is set to UTC time when nomination reaches threshold

data_access.rationale: FastAPI router for managing prior art nominations with database persistence and community voting

side_effects.rationale: Queries nominations, tools, users, and votes for listing and validation
Creates nominations, votes, and notifications; updates confirmation status
Notifies tool authors of nominations and confirmations

authority.rationale: This component is the authoritative handler for creating and managing prior art nominations and votes within the centaur.tools registry
